title: dioscorea alata
intro: Dioscorea alata, also known as the lesser yam, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea alata include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of osteoarthritis and diabetes. Dioscorea alata can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or tea, or as a topical cream or oil for external use.
